uses Permit2 for token transfers. Orders are signed (EIP-1271 for contracts),      submitted to the UniswapX API, and settled asynchronously by fillers.      For use with AssetManager ammRebalance: an off-chain service must submit the order      to the UniswapX API after swap() approves the hash. Settlement occurs when      a filler executes the order via the reactor.","events":{"CancelTrade(bytes,address,address)":{"params":{"data":"The data of the trade.","provider":"The provider of the trade.","sender":"The sender of the trade."}},"Initialized(uint8)":{"details":"Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized."},"Trade(bytes,address,address)":{"params":{"data":"The data of the trade.","provider":"The provider of the trade.","sender":"The sender of the trade."}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"approveHash(bytes32)":{"details":"The hash must be the full EIP-712 hash from Permit2's permitWitnessTransferFrom. raw://9d213d3befca47da33f6db0310826bcdb148299805c10d77175ecfe1d06a9a68","dweb:/ipfs/QmRgCn6SP1hbBkExUADFuDo8xkT4UU47yjNF5FhCeRbQmS"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Address.sol":{"keccak256":"0x006dd67219697fe68d7fbfdea512e7c4cb64a43565ed86171d67e844982da6fa","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://2455248c8ddd9cc6a7af76a13973cddf222072427e7b0e2a7d1aff345145e931","dweb:/ipfs/QmfYjnjRbWqYpuxurqveE6HtzsY1Xx323J428AKQgtBJZm"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Context.sol":{"keccak256":"0xa92e4fa126feb6907daa0513ddd816b2eb91f30a808de54f63c17d0e162c3439","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://a367861093b74443b137564d3f3c472f70bcf114739e62059c939f25e315706c","dweb:/ipfs/Qmd7JMpcxD9RuQjK3uM3EzJUgSqdN8vzp8eytEiuwxQJ6h"]},"src/interfaces/IIntentProvider.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd96da31088feacd1420aac86a356918035dee2684bc9686b43c7ef389b8ecac1","license":"AGPL-3.0-only","urls":["bzz-raw://420de7970a5ec07d8f2cee32a5688f0c04f636979111181bcd023681264bd637","dweb:/ipfs/QmP1khRFH4yH6qEud1J2GPYD8eBp5uZzVYZjaYd6AbC9uu"]},"src/interfaces/IProvider.sol":{"keccak256":"0xaee109f1dce3891c0ddfd90006f16d4fb906b2cda3d50608680cde5847bef991","license":"AGPL-3.0-only","urls":["bzz-raw://71145c89fcf0fdc891fd3a03ddd4bc45163a8e20dad9e81e88e4478ba5dcc4d2","dweb:/ipfs/QmfH6Kj7UGF1rnr9Ygtk436282sAxvAvToQrgQE6L4VfAy"]},"src/libs/cow/IERC1271.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9b70d292c641c48ab85a84cc36ace4b6d2be91eebd77335f2b4829d447b33afc","license":"AGPL-3.0-only","urls":["bzz-raw://d8680a6315808a177b20128fd6d5526717c8fe9410dc5748e67df2690354c0ea","dweb:/ipfs/QmZwniQ6JYy525kaLNCFwFA8GJcRsG6P5QGXzemzwBYdBB"]},"src/providers/UniswapXProvider.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe3d639014afe22f249a1c92f37c72de3a1ba07aa8514eb206fb39c46033a0967","license":"AGPL-3.0-only","urls":["bzz-raw://189df943df6da9a01f2bb3ea78662c590c0412dccc655aa1c2591d37071193c9","dweb:/ipfs/QmX21yazBbysTKU8ZJeCot16ERMMtL4Edn3D7ogyy7bJSz"]}},"version":1}

approveHash(bytes32).details: The hash must be the full EIP-712 hash from Permit2's permitWitnessTransferFrom.      Used when submitting orders to UniswapX API with EIP-1271 scheme.

params.hash: The Permit2 witness hash to approve

params.data: abi.encode(bytes32 hash) when hash was set in trade with hashToApprove, or        abi.encode(bytes32 hash, address sellToken) to revoke approval (e.g. trade had hashToApprove == 0).

params.hashes: The Permit2 witness hashes to clean up.

params.permit2_: The address of the Permit2 contract
params.reactor_: The address of the UniswapX reactor

params.newOwner: The address to set as the owner.

isValidSignature(bytes32,bytes).details: Returns MAGICVALUE if the hash is approved by the owner

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.tokens: The sell tokens whose Permit2 approvals should be revoked.

trade(bytes).details: Approves the given hash for Permit2 signature verification.      Tokens are transferred to this contract and approved for Permit2.      Order must be submitted to UniswapX API by an off-chain service.      Settlement is asynchronous (filler executes the order).      NOTE: Cannot be used with AssetManager.ammRebalance() as-is - settlement is async.

params.data: Encoded: (sellToken, sellAmount, buyToken, buyAmountMin) or             (sellToken, sellAmount, buyToken, buyAmountMin, validTo) or             (sellToken, sellAmount, buyToken, buyAmountMin, validTo, hashToApprove) or             (sellToken, sellAmount, buyToken, buyAmountMin, validTo, hashToApprove, isSellOrder)             hashToApprove = full EIP-712 hash from Permit2 permitWitnessTransferFrom (computed off-chain)

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

approveHash(bytes32).notice: Approve a hash for EIP-1271 signing

approvedHashes(address,bytes32).notice: The hash is the full EIP-712 hash from Permit2's permitWitnessTransferFrom

cancelTrade(bytes).notice: Cancel a trade/order and revoke Permit2 allowance for the sell token when known.

cleanExpiredOrders(bytes32[]).notice: Permissionlessly clean up multiple expired orders: revokes approvals, transfers         any remaining sell token balances back to the owner.

initialize(address).notice: Initialize the provider and set the owner.

isValidSignature(bytes32,bytes).notice: EIP-1271: Verify signature for UniswapX/Permit2 orders

revokeApprovals(address[]).notice: Revoke token approvals to Permit2 for multiple tokens.

trade(bytes).notice: Swap via UniswapX using EIP-1271 (sign to sell/buy)
